message.content:
You are test-agent for task T6: M6-Frontend-Infra — Pinia Store + API Service + Router + Types.

INPUT (Read these files FIRST):
- PLAN: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/docs/dev-team/m1-m2-m3-m6/2026-03-06-PLAN.md
- CONTRACT: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/docs/dev-team/m1-m2-m3-m6/2026-03-06-CONTRACT.md
- Spec file: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/docs/specs/M6-task-list-page.md
- READONLY context: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/frontend/src/main.ts, C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/frontend/package.json
- Frontend source dir: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/frontend/src/
- Test framework: Vitest (already in package.json)
- Log output: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/docs/dev-team/m1-m2-m3-m6/logs/test-agent-6.log.md

Also read the vitest config if it exists:
- C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/frontend/vite.config.ts (vitest may be configured here)
- C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/frontend/vitest.config.ts (if exists)

Task description:
Build frontend infrastructure: Pinia taskStore, axios API service, router update, TypeScript types.

ALLOWED implementation files (that the Worker will create — you write tests for these):
1. src/types/task.ts — TypeScript interfaces: Task, PageResponse, CreateTaskRequest; enums: Priority, TaskStatus
2. src/api/taskApi.ts — axios instance with JWT interceptor + fetchTasks(params), createTask(data), getTask(id) functions
3. src/stores/taskStore.ts — Pinia store with state (tasks, page, size, totalElements, totalPages, keyword, priorityFilter, statusFilter, loading, error) and actions (fetchTasks, setKeyword, setPriorityFilter, setStatusFilter, setPage, createTask)
4. src/router/index.ts — MODIFY: add /tasks route pointing to TaskListPage

Acceptance criteria to test:
- taskStore initial state: tasks=[], page=0, size=20, totalElements=0, totalPages=0, keyword='', priorityFilter=null, statusFilter=null, loading=false, error=null
- taskStore.fetchTasks: calls GET /api/tasks with correct query params, updates state with response
- taskStore.setKeyword: sets keyword, resets page to 0, calls fetchTasks
- taskStore.setPriorityFilter: sets priorityFilter, resets page to 0, calls fetchTasks
- taskStore.setStatusFilter: sets statusFilter, resets page to 0, calls fetchTasks
- taskStore.setPage: sets page, calls fetchTasks
- taskStore.createTask: calls POST /api/tasks, then calls fetchTasks to refresh
- taskStore.fetchTasks: sets loading=true before request, loading=false after
- taskStore.fetchTasks: sets error message on API failure
- taskApi.fetchTasks: sends correct query params (page, size, keyword, priority, status)
- taskApi: axios interceptor adds Authorization header from stored token
- router: /tasks route exists and is accessible

YOUR JOB: Design and write tests BEFORE any implementation code exists.

TEST DESIGN STRATEGY:
1. Red/Green Tests — one per AC above
2. Boundary Tests — empty keyword, null filters
3. Error Case Tests — API failure, network error
4. Contract Tests — API call params match CONTRACT endpoints

TDD DISCIPLINE:
- Use Vitest + @vue/test-utils (for store testing with createPinia)
- Mock axios calls using vi.mock or vi.spyOn
- For store tests: use createPinia() with testing plugin
- For API tests: mock axios instance
- Test files go under: taskflow/frontend/src/__tests__/ or taskflow/frontend/src/stores/__tests__/
- Use .test.ts extension
- Do NOT create implementation files or stubs
- Tests MUST fail when run (no implementation exists yet)
- TypeScript tests

OUTPUT:
- Write test files
- Return: list of test file paths created

LOG WRITING:
Write to log path (append-only):
[LOG] task=T6 | event=test-design-start | strategy=red-green,boundary,error,contract
[LOG] task=T6 | event=test-design-complete | test-files={list} | test-count={number}

content.text: I'll start by reading the required input files to understand the specifications and contracts.
Now let me read all the required input files in parallel.

content.content:
1→[SECTION] Project Overview
     2→[GOAL] Implement TaskFlow M1 (Auth) + M2 (Task CRUD) + M3 (State Machine) + M6 (Task List Page) — full-stack from entity to frontend
     3→[ARCH] Spring Boot 3.2.3 + Java 17 + H2 in-memory + JPA + Spring Security + JJWT 0.12.5 | Vue 3.4 + Pinia 2.1 + axios + vue-router + Vite 5 + Vitest + TypeScript | stateless JWT auth | soft-delete pattern | state machine in enum
     4→[NAMING] Java: camelCase fields, PascalCase classes, lowercase packages (com.taskflow.*) | Vue: PascalCase components, camelCase props/methods, kebab-case file events | TS: PascalCase interfaces, camelCase fields
     5→[CONSTRAINTS] M4/M5 not implemented — M6 uses placeholder for assignee/tags | H2 in-memory (create-drop) | JWT secret in application.yml | all /api/** require auth except /api/auth/** and /h2-console/**
     6→[SHARED] config/SecurityConfig.java | entity/Task.java | service/TaskService.java | controller/TaskController.java | exception/GlobalExceptionHandler.java
     7→
     8→[SECTION] Standards
     9→[SOURCE] none
    10→[OVERRIDE] follow-actual-code
    11→
    12→[SECTION] Specs
    13→[SPEC] id=S1 | name=M1-Authentication | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M1-auth.md
    14→[SPEC] id=S2 | name=M2-Task-CRUD | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M2-task-crud.md
    15→[SPEC] id=S3 | name=M3-Task-State-Machine | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M3-task-state-machine.md
    16→[SPEC] id=S4 | name=M6-Task-List-Page | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M6-task-list-page.md
    17→
    18→[SECTION] Task Dependency Graph
    19→[DEP] T1 → T2 → T4 → T5 (backend chain)
    20→[DEP] T3 → T4 (entity feeds into service)
    21→[DEP] T6 → T7 (frontend chain)
    22→[DEP] T1,T3,T6 are independent (wave 1, max 3 concurrent)
    23→
    24→[SECTION] Execution Strategy
    25→[STRATEGY] parallel-per-task | max-concurrent=3
    26→[WAVE] 1: T1(M1-Foundation), T3(M2+M3-Entity), T6(M6-Frontend-Infra) — all independent
    27→[WAVE] 2: T2(M1-Auth-API) after T1, T7(M6-Frontend-UI) after T6
    28→[WAVE] 3: T4(M2-CRUD-API) after T1+T3
    29→[WAVE] 4: T5(M3-Status-API) after T4
    30→

1→[SECTION] API Contract
     2→[VERSION] 1
     3→
     4→[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/auth/register | req={username:string(3-50,alphanumeric+underscore),password:string(min8),displayName:string(1-100)} | res=201:{id:long,username:string,displayName:string} | errors=400,409
     5→[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/auth/login | req={username:string,password:string} | res=200:{token:string,expiresIn:long} | errors=401
     6→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/auth/me | req=none | res=200:{id:long,username:string,displayName:string} | errors=401
     7→[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/tasks | req={title:string(1-200,required),description:string(max5000,optional),priority:enum(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW,default:MEDIUM)} | res=201:{id:long,title:string,description:string,priority:string,status:string,createdBy:long,createdAt:datetime,updatedAt:datetime?} | errors=400,401
     8→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req=none | res=200:{id:long,title:string,description:string,priority:string,status:string,createdBy:long,createdAt:datetime,updatedAt:datetime?} | errors=401,404
     9→[ENDPOINT] method=PUT | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req={title:string(1-200,required),description:string(max5000,optional),priority:enum(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW,optional)} | res=200:{same-as-get} | errors=400,401,404
    10→[ENDPOINT] method=DELETE | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req=none | res=204:no-content | errors=401,404
    11→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks | req=query:{page:int(default:0),size:int(default:20),sort:string(default:createdAt,desc),keyword:string?,priority:enum?} | res=200:{content:TaskResponse[],page:int,size:int,totalElements:long,totalPages:int} | errors=401
    12→[ENDPOINT] method=PATCH | path=/api/tasks/{id}/status | req={status:enum(TODO|IN_PROGRESS|DONE|CLOSED)} | res=200:{same-as-task-response} | errors=400,401,404
    13→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks/{id}/transitions | req=none | res=200:{currentStatus:string,availableTransitions:string[]} | errors=401,404
    14→
    15→[SECTION] Shared Types
    16→[TYPE] name=TaskResponse | fields=id:long,title:string,description:string,priority:Priority,status:TaskStatus,createdBy:long,createdAt:LocalDateTime,updatedAt:LocalDateTime?
    17→[TYPE] name=UserResponse | fields=id:long,username:string,displayName:string
    18→[TYPE] name=PageResponse<T> | fields=content:T[],page:int,size:int,totalElements:long,totalPages:int
    19→[TYPE] name=Priority | fields=enum:HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW
    20→[TYPE] name=TaskStatus | fields=enum:TODO|IN_PROGRESS|DONE|CLOSED
    21→
    22→[SECTION] State Machine Rules
    23→[TRANSITION] TODO -> IN_PROGRESS
    24→[TRANSITION] IN_PROGRESS -> TODO
    25→[TRANSITION] IN_PROGRESS -> DONE
    26→[TRANSITION] DONE -> CLOSED
    27→[TERMINAL] CLOSED (no outgoing transitions)
    28→
    29→[SECTION] Error Format
    30→[FORMAT] status:int,message:string,errors?:string[]
    31→
    32→[SECTION] Amendment Log
    33→

1→# M6: Task List Page (Vue Frontend)
     2→
     3→## 需求描述
     4→
     5→本模組實現任務列表頁面，為 TaskFlow 系統的核心前端頁面之一。使用 Vue 3 框架搭配 Pinia 狀態管理與 axios HTTP 客戶端，提供分頁任務列表、關鍵字搜尋、優先級與狀態篩選等功能。
     6→
     7→頁面載入時自動從後端 API 取得任務列表，每頁預設顯示 20 筆任務。使用者可透過搜尋列依關鍵字篩選、透過下拉選單依優先級或狀態篩選任務。每個任務項目顯示標題、狀態標籤、優先級標籤、負責人名稱與關聯標籤。
     8→
     9→頁面提供「新增任務」按鈕開啟建立表單，以及分頁控制元件供使用者翻頁瀏覽。點擊任務項目可導航至任務詳情頁面。
    10→
    11→## 驗收標準
    12→
    13→- AC1: 進入 /tasks 路由時，頁面自動載入並顯示任務列表，每頁預設 20 筆，按建立時間降序排列
    14→- AC2: 搜尋列輸入關鍵字後，列表自動篩選僅顯示標題包含該關鍵字的任務（呼叫 GET /api/tasks?keyword=xxx）
    15→- AC3: 優先級下拉選單包含「全部」、HIGH、MEDIUM、LOW 四個選項，選擇後列表篩選僅顯示對應優先級的任務
    16→- AC4: 狀態下拉選單包含「全部」、TODO、IN_PROGRESS、DONE、CLOSED 五個選項，選擇後列表篩選僅顯示對應狀態的任務
    17→- AC5: 多個篩選條件可同時生效（例如 keyword + priority + status 組合篩選）
    18→- AC6: 每個任務項目顯示以下資訊：標題（title）、狀態標籤（status badge）、優先級標籤（priority badge）、負責人名稱（assignee displayName，若無則顯示「未指派」）、關聯標籤（tags，顯示標籤名稱與顏色）
    19→- AC7: 狀態標籤依狀態值顯示不同顏色：TODO 灰色、IN_PROGRESS 藍色、DONE 綠色、CLOSED 紅色
    20→- AC8: 優先級標籤依優先級值顯示不同顏色：HIGH 紅色、MEDIUM 橙色、LOW 綠色
    21→- AC9: 點擊任務項目，頁面導航至 /tasks/:id 任務詳情路由
    22→- AC10: 點擊「新增任務」按鈕，開啟任務建立表單（TaskCreateForm 元件）
    23→- AC11: 任務建立表單包含 title（必填）、description（選填）、priority（下拉選單，預設 MEDIUM）欄位，送出後呼叫 POST /api/tasks 建立任務
    24→- AC12: 任務建立成功後，表單關閉並自動重新載入任務列表以顯示新任務
    25→- AC13: 分頁控制元件顯示當前頁碼、總頁數，提供「上一頁」、「下一頁」按鈕
    26→- AC14: 點擊「上一頁」或「下一頁」按鈕，載入對應頁碼的任務資料
    27→- AC15: 第一頁時「上一頁」按鈕停用（disabled），最後一頁時「下一頁」按鈕停用
    28→- AC16: API 請求進行中時，頁面顯示載入中狀態（loading indicator）
    29→- AC17: API 請求失敗時，頁面顯示錯誤提示訊息
    30→
    31→## 元件結構
    32→
    33→### TaskListPage
    34→- 路由: /tasks
    35→- 說明: 任務列表頁面主元件，負責組合篩選區塊、任務列表與分頁控制元件
    36→- 職責: 管理頁面層級狀態（loading、error），協調子元件互動
    37→
    38→### TaskFilters
    39→- 說明: 篩選區塊元件，包含搜尋列與篩選下拉選單
    40→- Props: 無（從 Pinia store 讀取當前篩選狀態）
    41→- Events: 篩選條件變更時觸發 store action 重新載入任務列表
    42→- 內容:
    43→  - 搜尋輸入框（keyword）
    44→  - 優先級下拉選單（priority filter）
    45→  - 狀態下拉選單（status filter）
    46→
    47→### TaskListItem
    48→- 說明: 單一任務項目元件，顯示任務摘要資訊
    49→- Props:
    50→  - `task` (Object, required) — 任務物件，包含 id、title、status、priority、assignee、tags
    51→- Events:
    52→  - `click` — 點擊時觸發，由父元件處理路由導航
    53→- 顯示內容: 標題、狀態 badge、優先級 badge、負責人名稱、標籤列表
    54→
    55→### TaskCreateForm
    56→- 說明: 新增任務的彈出表單元件
    57→- Props:
    58→  - `visible` (Boolean, required) — 控制表單顯示/隱藏
    59→- Events:
    60→  - `created` — 任務建立成功後觸發
    61→  - `cancel` — 使用者取消操作時觸發
    62→- 表單欄位: title（必填，1-200 字元）、description（選填，最大 5000 字元）、priority（下拉選單，預設 MEDIUM）
    63→
    64→### Pagination
    65→- 說明: 分頁控制元件
    66→- Props:
    67→  - `currentPage` (Number, required) — 當前頁碼（從 0 開始）
    68→  - `totalPages` (Number, required) — 總頁數
    69→- Events:
    70→  - `page-change` (Number) — 頁碼變更時觸發，攜帶目標頁碼
    71→
    72→## 狀態管理 (Pinia Store)
    73→
    74→### taskStore
    75→- State:
    76→  - `tasks` (Array) — 當前頁任務列表
    77→  - `page` (Number) — 當前頁碼，預設 0
    78→  - `size` (Number) — 每頁筆數，預設 20
    79→  - `totalElements` (Number) — 總任務數
    80→  - `totalPages` (Number) — 總頁數
    81→  - `keyword` (String) — 搜尋關鍵字
    82→  - `priorityFilter` (String|null) — 優先級篩選值
    83→  - `statusFilter` (String|null) — 狀態篩選值
    84→  - `loading` (Boolean) — 載入中狀態
    85→  - `error` (String|null) — 錯誤訊息
    86→- Actions:
    87→  - `fetchTasks()` — 依據當前篩選條件與分頁參數呼叫 GET /api/tasks 取得任務列表
    88→  - `setKeyword(keyword)` — 設定搜尋關鍵字並重新載入（重置頁碼為 0）
    89→  - `setPriorityFilter(priority)` — 設定優先級篩選並重新載入（重置頁碼為 0）
    90→  - `setStatusFilter(status)` — 設定狀態篩選並重新載入（重置頁碼為 0）
    91→  - `setPage(page)` — 設定頁碼並重新載入
    92→  - `createTask(taskData)` — 呼叫 POST /api/tasks 建立任務，成功後重新載入列表
    93→
    94→## 業務規則
    95→
    96→- BR1: 任務列表使用 axios 呼叫後端 API，所有請求自動附帶 JWT Token（透過 axios interceptor）
    97→- BR2: 篩選條件變更時自動重置頁碼為第 0 頁，避免超出範圍
    98→- BR3: 搜尋為即時篩選（可加入 debounce 300ms 延遲以減少 API 呼叫頻率）
    99→- BR4: 任務列表狀態統一由 Pinia taskStore 管理，元件透過 store 讀取與更新資料
   100→- BR5: 空列表時顯示「目前沒有任務」提示文字
   101→- BR6: 狀態 badge 顏色對應：TODO=#6B7280（灰）、IN_PROGRESS=#3B82F6（藍）、DONE=#10B981（綠）、CLOSED=#EF4444（紅）
   102→- BR7: 優先級 badge 顏色對應：HIGH=#EF4444（紅）、MEDIUM=#F59E0B（橙）、LOW=#10B981（綠）
   103→
   104→## 相依模組
   105→
   106→- 依賴: M2 (Task CRUD) — 任務列表與建立 API、M3 (Task State Machine) — 狀態篩選與顯示、M5 (Assignment) — 負責人資訊顯示與篩選
   107→- 被依賴: 無
   108→

1→import { createApp } from 'vue'
     2→import { createPinia } from 'pinia'
     3→import App from './App.vue'
     4→import router from './router'
     5→
     6→const app = createApp(App)
     7→app.use(createPinia())
     8→app.use(router)
     9→app.mount('#app')
    10→

The tests are behaving correctly:
- **Router tests**: 4 fail because `/tasks` route doesn't exist yet (assertion errors, as expected)
- **Types tests**: fail because `@/types/task` module doesn't exist yet 
- **API tests**: fail because `@/api/taskApi` module doesn't exist yet
- **Store tests**: fail because `@/stores/taskStore` module doesn't exist yet
- 1 router test passes (the home route `/` exists already)

All failures are due to missing implementation, which is the correct TDD red phase. Now let me write the log file.

content.text:
Here is a summary of what was done:

---

**Test files created (4 files, 50 tests total):**

1. **`C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/frontend/src/__tests__/types/task.test.ts`** (7 tests)
   - Priority enum: has HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW, exactly 3 members
   - TaskStatus enum: has TODO/IN_PROGRESS/DONE/CLOSED, exactly 4 members
   - Task interface: valid object with all fields, nullable updatedAt
   - PageResponse interface: valid generic object with content array
   - CreateTaskRequest interface: required-only and all-fields variants

2. **`C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/frontend/src/__tests__/api/taskApi.test.ts`** (11 tests)
   - Axios instance creation
   - JWT interceptor registration, adds Authorization header when token exists, omits when absent
   - fetchTasks: correct query params, omits null/empty filters, returns PageResponse
   - createTask: POST /api/tasks with body, returns created task
   - getTask: GET /api/tasks/:id, returns task data

3. **`C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/frontend/src/__tests__/stores/taskStore.test.ts`** (27 tests)
   - Initial state: all 10 fields verified (tasks=[], page=0, size=20, totalElements=0, totalPages=0, keyword='', priorityFilter=null, statusFilter=null, loading=false, error=null)
   - fetchTasks: correct params, keyword/priority/status forwarding, state update, loading=true during request, loading=false after success/failure, error set on failure, error cleared on success
   - setKeyword: sets value, resets page to 0, calls fetchTasks, handles empty string
   - setPriorityFilter: sets value, resets page to 0, calls fetchTasks, handles null
   - setStatusFilter: sets value, resets page to 0, calls fetchTasks, handles null
   - setPage: sets value, calls fetchTasks, handles page=0
   - createTask: calls API, refreshes list, propagates error
   - Contract: combined filters in single request
   - Error cases: network error, 401, 500

4. **`C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/frontend/src/__tests__/router/router.test.ts`** (5 tests)
   - /tasks route exists, resolves to valid route, has correct name, has component, home route preserved

**Config change:**
- **`C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/frontend/vite.config.ts`** -- added `@/` path alias resolution, `jsdom` test environment, and vitest type reference so tests can resolve imports and access DOM APIs.

**Red phase confirmed:** All 4 test files fail when run. Router tests fail with assertion errors (route not found). Types, API, and store tests fail at import resolution (implementation files do not exist yet). This is the expected TDD red state.
